message:
build(deps): bump lz4_flex 0.11→0.12, webpki-roots 0.26→1.0

- lz4_flex 0.12: improved compression performance and API stability
- webpki-roots 1.0: major version with updated Mozilla root CA bundle
  and simplified API (breaking: removed deprecated accessors)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
